Six swift sheep visit the servo* soon. (*station)
Proper copper pots pour flat whites* (*coffees)
Red lorry, yellow lorry, ripper* rally! (*great)
Thin thieves throw thick thongs* there. (*shoes)
Chuck a U-ey*, then choose cheap chips. (*U-turn)
Fair dinkum* foxes fight for fresh fish. (*real)
Bite the bullet*, brave big blue baboons! (*act)
Jump the gun*, judge juggling giant gems. (*rush)
Wild winds whip wet woolly willy-willies* (*dust)
Spill the beans*, brave bright blokes! (*confess)
